36496.description: Piera Ingmarsh was first described as short, broad shouldered, silver streaked hair, green eyes, with calm bearing.

36497.description: Wick Cormere the 2nd was first described as short, sturdy, auburn hair, blue eyes, with steady bearing.

36498.description: Kell Quabrook the 4th was first described as tall, heavyset, black hair, amber eyes, with alert bearing.

36499.description: Dala Vorhill the 4th was first described as compact, slender, closely shorn hair, blue eyes, with alert bearing.
